name: Git Worktrees for Concurrent AI Agent Work
description: Multiple AI agent sessions working on the same repository cause chaos. Session A is on branch feature/auth. Session B switches to main to check something. Session A's next tool call fails because the branch disappeared. Or worse: Session B force-pushes over Session A's work.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Git Worktrees para Trabalho Paralelo de Agentes IA
pt-BR.description: Múltiplas sessões de agentes IA trabalhando no mesmo repositório causam caos. Worktrees isolam trabalho paralelo.
